assumptions.static_mode: Reuses the current market_context.json snapshot for every historical candle.
assumptions.proxy_mode: Derives funding, retail crowding, fear/greed, and OI proxies from historical price/volume. This is an inference, not real historical sentiment data.
assumptions.execution: Single BTC position at a time, 0.05% taker fee per side, conservative intrabar exits when both TP and SL touch the same candle.
